chooseTransactionKindDescription: Pick the kind of transaction you want to create.
standardTransactionDescription: Create a regular income or expense with a category.
transferTransactionDescription: Move money between your own accounts.
exchangeTransactionDescription: Record a currency exchange between two amounts.
transactionMoveToTrashFailed: Could not move transaction to trash.
moveToTrashModalDescriptionSuffix: will be removed from your active transactions and moved to Trash.
moveToTrashModalRestoreHint: You will still be able to restore it later from Trash.
moveToTrashTransferReferenceHint: Because this is a transfer, the linked reference transaction will also be moved to Trash.
moveToTrashExchangeReferenceHint: Because this is an exchange, the linked reference transaction will also be moved to Trash.
restoreTransactionModalDescriptionSuffix: will return to your active transactions list.
restoreTransferReferenceHint: Because this is a transfer, the linked reference transaction will be restored as well.
restoreExchangeReferenceHint: Because this is an exchange, the linked reference transaction will be restored as well.
permanentDeleteModalDescriptionSuffix: will be removed from Trash permanently. This action cannot be undone.
permanentDeleteModalNoUndoHint: After permanent deletion, this transaction cannot be restored.
permanentDeleteTransferReferenceHint: Because this is a transfer, the linked reference transaction will be permanently deleted as well.
permanentDeleteExchangeReferenceHint: Because this is an exchange, the linked reference transaction will be permanently deleted as well.
emptyTrashWarningDescription: All trashed transactions will be permanently deleted and will no longer be recoverable.
emptyTrashModalDescription: You are about to permanently delete {{count}} trashed transaction records.
emptyTrashLinkedHint: Linked transfer and exchange references that are currently in Trash will be permanently deleted too.
emptyTrashConfirmationHint: Enter {{confirmationValue}} exactly to enable permanent deletion.
amountValidNumber: Amount must be a valid number.
amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero.
transferAccountsMustDiffer: Source and target accounts must be different.
